title: Ant Design Pro v6.0.0 Release Notes
citation: Ant Design Pro v6.0.0 GitHub release notes, accessed 2026-05-03; npm package metadata queried for @ant-design/pro-components v3 beta on 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Administrative UI stack planning and implementation guidance for Ant Design 6-compatible Pro layout conventions.
claims_supported: Ant Design Pro v6.0.0 was released on 2026-04-30.
The v6 release notes describe React 19, Ant Design 6, Tailwind CSS, Biome, and ProComponents v3 as part of the modernized stack.
As queried on 2026-05-03, @ant-design/pro-components@3.1.12-0 is MIT licensed and declares peer dependency antd ^6.0.0.
claims_not_supported: That the ProComponents v3 prerelease API will remain stable before a non-prerelease npm latest tag.
That OpenClinXR should adopt Umi Max or utoopack instead of its current Vite/React Router direction without a dedicated architecture decision.
